indexes.name: rag_response_cache_key_idx

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_response_cache_owner_kind_idx ON public.rag_response_cache USING btree (owner_id, cache_kind, updated_at DESC)
indexes.name: rag_response_cache_owner_kind_idx

indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX rag_response_cache_pkey ON public.rag_response_cache USING btree (id)
indexes.name: rag_response_cache_pkey

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_retrieval_logs_miss_idx ON public.rag_retrieval_logs USING btree (is_miss, created_at DESC) WHERE (is_miss = true)
indexes.name: rag_retrieval_logs_miss_idx

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_retrieval_logs_owner_created_idx ON public.rag_retrieval_logs USING btree (owner_id, created_at DESC)
indexes.name: rag_retrieval_logs_owner_created_idx

indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX rag_retrieval_logs_pkey ON public.rag_retrieval_logs USING btree (id)
indexes.name: rag_retrieval_logs_pkey

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_retrieval_logs_strategy_idx ON public.rag_retrieval_logs USING btree (retrieval_strategy, created_at DESC)
indexes.name: rag_retrieval_logs_strategy_idx

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_visual_eval_cases_doc_idx ON public.rag_visual_eval_cases USING btree (document_id, active)
indexes.name: rag_visual_eval_cases_doc_idx

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_visual_eval_cases_owner_id_idx ON public.rag_visual_eval_cases USING btree (owner_id)
indexes.name: rag_visual_eval_cases_owner_id_idx

indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX rag_visual_eval_cases_pkey ON public.rag_visual_eval_cases USING btree (id)
indexes.name: rag_visual_eval_cases_pkey

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_visual_eval_runs_case_id_idx ON public.rag_visual_eval_runs USING btree (case_id)
indexes.name: rag_visual_eval_runs_case_id_idx

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX rag_visual_eval_runs_document_id_idx ON public.rag_visual_eval_runs USING btree (document_id)
indexes.name: rag_visual_eval_runs_document_id_idx

indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX rag_visual_eval_runs_pkey ON public.rag_visual_eval_runs USING btree (id)
indexes.name: rag_visual_eval_runs_pkey

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX storage_cleanup_jobs_document_idx ON public.storage_cleanup_jobs USING btree (document_id)
indexes.name: storage_cleanup_jobs_document_idx

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX storage_cleanup_jobs_owner_status_idx ON public.storage_cleanup_jobs USING btree (owner_id, status, created_at DESC)
indexes.name: storage_cleanup_jobs_owner_status_idx

indexes.def: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX storage_cleanup_jobs_pkey ON public.storage_cleanup_jobs USING btree (id)
indexes.name: storage_cleanup_jobs_pkey

indexes.def: CREATE INDEX storage_cleanup_jobs_status_created_idx ON public.storage_cleanup_jobs USING btree (status, created_at) WHERE (status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::text, 'failed'::text]))
indexes.name: storage_cleanup_jobs_status_created_idx

policies.name: api rate limit subjects service role all
api rate limits service role all
registry record sources service role all
chunks owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_chunks.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: embedding fields owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_embedding_fields.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: images owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_images.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: document index units owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_index_units.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: labels owner manual delete
policies.qual: ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = owner_id) AND (source = 'manual'::text))

policies.name: labels owner manual insert
policies.with_check: ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = owner_id) AND (source = 'manual'::text))

policies.name: labels owner manual update
policies.qual: ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = owner_id) AND (source = 'manual'::text))
policies.with_check: ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = owner_id) AND (source = 'manual'::text))

policies.name: pages owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_pages.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: table facts owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_table_facts.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: indexing v3 agent jobs service role all
ingestion job stages service role all
jobs owner read
policies.qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM public.documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = ingestion_jobs.document_id) AND (d.owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))))

policies.name: rag aliases owner read
policies.qual: ((owner_id IS NULL) OR (owner_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)))

policies.name: rag response cache service role all
rag visual eval cases service role all
rag visual eval runs service role all
